subcodes.first_line: Say: O servants! The morn of Manifestation hath dawned, and the fragrance of the divine raiment is diffused, and the breeze of the All-Merciful wafteth from the Yemen of the Beloved [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: بگو ای عباد صبح ظهور طالع و عرف قمیص متضوع و رائحه رحمن از یمن جانان در هبوب
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @chastisement and requital, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering
